DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS BAART PROGRAMS, INC., BAART COMMUNITY HEALTHCARE, BAART BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES, INC. MOTION TO REOPEN PLAINTIFFS SUSPENDED DEPOSITION AND COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS: MOTION GRANTED AS TO THE DEPOSITION. MOTION DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO THE DOCUMENTS. THE DEPOSITION NOTICE DID NOT HAVE A REQUEST FOR DOCUMENTS AND DEFENDANT DID NOT BRING A MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS PURSUANT TO A DOCUMENT REQUEST. DEFENDANT TO SERVE AN AMENDED DEPOSITION NOTICE WITH A DOCUMENT REQUEST FOR THE DOCUMENTS IN ISSUE FOR JULY 30, 2020 AT 11:00 A.M. THE DEPOSITION WILL BE LIMITED IN TIME FOR FOUR (4) HOURS OF ACTUAL DEPOSITION TESTIMONY. THE ISSUE OF SANCTIONS IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 7, 2020. THE COURT WILL TAKE INTO CONSIDERATION WHETHER OR NOT THERE WAS COMPLIANCE WITH THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SEND PROPOSED ORDER TRACKING THE TENTATIVE RULING VIA EMAIL TO KLGALLO@DISCOVERYREFEREE.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE GALLO, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Motion To Reopen Plaintiffs Suspended Deposition And Compel Production Of Documents; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-10-2020 Continued To Aug-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs BAART PROGRAMS, INC., BAART COMMUNITY HEALTHCARE, BAART BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES, INC. Motion To Reopen Plaintiffs Suspended Deposition And Compel Production Of Documents; And Request For Monetary Sanctions: Motion granted as to the deposition. Motion denied without prejudice as to the documents. The deposition notice did not have a request for documents and defendant did not bring a motion to compel production of documents pursuant to a document request. Defendant to serve an amended deposition notice with a document request for the documents in issue for July 30, 2020 at 11:00 a.m. The deposition will be limited in time for four (4) hours of actual deposition testimony. The issue of sanctions is continued to August 7, 2020. The court will take into consideration whether or not there was compliance with this order.

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the tentative ruling via email to Klgallo@discoveryreferee.com
